automations.label: Issue triage sweep
automations.purpose: Review open engineering issues and identify stale, blocked, duplicate, or under-specified work.
automations.instruction: Review the active engineering issue queue. Identify stale, blocked, duplicate, under-specified, or ready-to-implement issues. Produce a concise triage report with issue links, recommended next action, and any scope-drift risk. Do not edit issues or code unless explicitly instructed.
automations.seedMemory: This automation is a paused marketplace preset for engineering commanders. Enable it only after confirming the repository and issue queue it should inspect.

automations.label: Release drift review
automations.purpose: Compare open release PR scope against linked issues and flag omissions, additions, and shortcuts.
automations.instruction: Review the active release PRs and their linked issues. Compare requested issue scope with implementation summaries and changed files. Flag omissions, unrelated additions, hotfix-only behavior, deferred work, and missing verification. Produce a drift report; do not create follow-up issues unless explicitly instructed.
automations.seedMemory: This automation is a paused marketplace preset for release review. It should protect issue scope rather than expand or shrink it.
